healthy.name: Healthy Rice Leaf
healthy.cause: No disease detected. Your rice plant looks healthy!
healthy.treatment: No treatment needed. Continue good farming practices.
healthy.prevention: Maintain proper irrigation and use balanced fertilizers.

leaf_blast.name: Rice Leaf Blast
leaf_blast.cause: Caused by the fungus Magnaporthe oryzae. Spreads through wind and water.
symptoms: Gray or white center with brown border
Lesions may merge causing large dead areas
leaf_blast.treatment: Apply fungicide (Tricyclazole or Isoprothiolane). Remove infected leaves immediately.
leaf_blast.prevention: Use resistant varieties, avoid excessive nitrogen, ensure proper spacing.

bacterial_blight.name: Bacterial Blight
bacterial_blight.cause: Caused by Xanthomonas oryzae bacteria. Spreads through water and wind.
symptoms: Yellow to white stripes along leaf margins
Milky bacterial ooze visible in morning
bacterial_blight.treatment: Apply copper-based bactericide. Drain flooded fields. Remove infected plants.
bacterial_blight.prevention: Use certified disease-free seeds, avoid deep flooding, use resistant varieties.

brown_spot.name: Brown Spot
brown_spot.cause: Caused by fungus Cochliobolus miyabeanus. Common in nutrient-deficient soils.
symptoms: Small brown circular spots on leaves
Spots have yellow halo around them
Spots enlarge and merge over time
Black fruiting bodies visible in dead spots
brown_spot.treatment: Apply fungicide (Mancozeb or Iprodione). Improve soil nutrition with potassium.
brown_spot.prevention: Balanced fertilization, proper water management, use resistant varieties.

tungro.name: Tungro Disease
tungro.cause: Caused by two viruses transmitted by green leafhopper insects.
tungro.treatment: No cure once infected. Remove and burn infected plants immediately.
tungro.prevention: Control leafhopper insects, use resistant varieties, synchronize planting dates.
